DECLARATION OF JANE BING LEE FILED IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT LEE S CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425 16 (ANTI-SLAPP) MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFFS OKAMOTO AND OWYANG (TRANSACTION ID # 68729869) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, JANE BING AS TRUSTEE OF THE LEES LIVING TRUST DATED MAY 21 1991

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION OF DEFENDANT LEE'S CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 (ANTI-SLAPP) MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFFS OKAMOTO AND OWYANG IS GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: 1) THE WORDS: "AND BY FILING A FRIVOLOUS LAWSUIT. CGC-22-594417" IN PARAGRAPH 4. 2) THE WORD: "TO THE LAWSUIT" AND "AND LAWSUIT" IN PARAGRAPH 10. THE MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. NOTICE OF MOTION DOES NOT CONTAIN THE SPECIFIC LANGUAGE DEFENDANTS SEEK TO STRIKE (CRC 3.1322) AND THE COURT COULD NOT LOCATE THE LANGUAGE QUOTED IN THE POINT AND AUTHORITIES AT 3:15-22) IN THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT FILED IN ACTION CGC-22-603547 ON DECEMBER 20, 2022. COMPARE, FOR EXAMPLE, QUOTE PURPORTEDLY LOCATED AT PARAGRAPH 16, PAGE 5:7-9 "MR. WASSERMAN KNEW THAT THE ONLY COURT OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFFS TO COLLECT THE RELOCATION FEE DUE THEM WAS TO FILE A LAWSUIT" AND PARAGRAPH 16 OF THE COMPLAINT ON FILE. ALSO SEE PARAGRAPH 11 QUOTED IN THE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND PARAGRAPH 11 OF THE COMPLAINT. THE COURT, HAVING REVIEWED A SIMILAR MOTION IN CASE CGC-22-603454 ASSUMES THAT THIS MOTION WAS RECYCLED WITHOUT SUFFICIENT EDITING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

Motion Of Defendant Lee S Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 (Anti-Slapp) Motion To Strike The Complaint Of Plaintiffs Okamoto And Owyang
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

MOTION OF DEFENDANT LEE'S CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 (ANTI-SLAPP) MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFFS OKAMOTO AND OWYANG is GRANTED in part as follows: 1) The words: "and by filing a frivolous lawsuit. CGC-22-594417" in paragraph 4. 2) The word: "to the lawsuit" and "and lawsuit" in paragraph 10. The motion is otherwise denied. Notice of motion does not contain the specific language Defendants seek to strike (CRC 3.1322) and the Court could not locate the language quoted in the Point and Authorities at 3:15-22) in the operative complaint filed in action CGC-22-603547 on December 20, 2022. Compare, for example, quote purportedly located at paragraph 16, page 5:7-9 "Mr. Wasserman knew that the only court of action for Plaintiffs to collect the relocation fee due them was to file a lawsuit" and paragraph 16 of the Complaint on file. Also see paragraph 11 quoted in the Points and Authorities and paragraph 11 of the Complaint. The Court, having reviewed a similar motion in case CGC-22-603454 assumes that this motion was recycled without sufficient editing.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
